privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic HL7 v2.5.1 test file generated at task initialization containing a valid ORU^R01 (Observation Result) message. The test file is located at /home/ga/test_oru.hl7 and contains patient data (JOHNSON^ROBERT^A) with a CBC (Complete Blood Count) lab result. The file currently has MSH-5 (Receiving Application) set to 'OLDRECEIVER' which should be transformed to 'LAB_REPOSITORY' by the channel. The channel should listen on input directory /opt/mirthdata/input, move processed files to /opt/mirthdata/processed, and output results to /opt/mirthdata/output.
